hooks.name: Sync Docs on Power Change
hooks.description: When a file inside the powers/ directory is edited (mcp.json, POWER.md, or assets), reminds the agent to check if steering files or other documentation need updating to stay consistent.

action.prompt: A file inside powers/ was just modified. Check if any documentation files (.kiro/steering/*.md, CONTRIBUTING.md) need updating to reflect this change. Use the doc-writer skill if documentation is now out of sync with the powers directory.
